name: Amitoje anti-COVID kit
description: The Amitoje anti-COVID kit consists of a bed, foldable foot sanitiser dispenser, and face shield.

taxonomy.sub_category: Amitoje anti-COVID kit Updated on January 12, 2024 · Created on August 30, 2020 Amitoje anti-COVID kit Open-source The Amitoje anti-COVID kit consists of a bed, foldable foot sanitiser dispenser, and face shield. Developed By Amitoje India Tested By Amitoje India Content Partners Unknown Info Tags Open-source Snapshot Manufacturing & Delivery Performance & Use Research & Standards Feedback Product Description The Amitoje anti-COVID kit is manufactured by Amitoje India. The kit is designed in response to the need for quarantine beds and good hygiene practices during the COVID-19 pandemic. The product consists of a Foldable Bed and Sanitiser Dispenser (Footpress) that are waterproof, made from 100% recycled plastic, and portable. The product also provides a PVC Plastic 500 micron face shield. Target SDGs SDG 3: Good Health and Well-Being SDG 6: Clean Water and Sanitation Market Suggested Retail Price $46.77 Target Users (Target Impact Group) Small and Medium-sized Enterprises, Public Sector Agencies Distributors / Implementing Organizations The product is manufactured and distributed by Amitoje India. Regions Worldwide Manufacturing/Building Method The product is manufactured by Amitoje India at the head office in New Delhi, India. Intellectural Property Type Open-source User Provision Model The product can be acquired directly from Amitoje India through a product enquiry form. Products can only be acquired in bulk as the manufacturer deals in custom products. Distributions to Date Status Over 40,000 units have been distributed to date. Interview with Amitoje India, July 2020 Consumables Soap Number of uses No limit Power supply type None Size Amitoje Bed 71.12 x 76.2 x 17.8 cm (Folded) 71.12 x 76.2 x 190.5 cm (Unfolded) Fold-able Sanitiser Dispenser (Footpress) 121.92 x 30.48 x 30.48 cm Design Specifications The Amitoje kit contains the following: Amitoje Bed Weight - less than 10 kg Load capacity - 200 kg Material - 100% recyclable plastic Waterproof Foldable Sanitiser Dispenser (Footpress) Weight - 2.5 kg Material - 100% recyclable plastic Loads most sanitiser bottles Waterproof Amitoje FaceX (removable face-shield) Material - Ultraclear PVC plastic 500 micron Clarity - High Waterproof Easily retractable Lightweight Product Schematics Technical Support Technical support is provided by the manufacturer. Replacement Components Sanitiser can be ordered in bulk for the Foldable Sanitiser Dispenser (Footpress). Lifecycle The manufacturer states a life cycle of greater than 2 years for the Amitoje Bed and Foldable Sanitiser Dispenser (Footpress). Manufacturer Specified Performance Parameters The manufacturer states lightweight, waterproof and damage proof as performance targets. Vetted Performance Status The manufacturer has determined a load capacity of 200 kg for the Amitoje Bed, however no third party testing has been conducted. Face shields have been found to reduce immediate viral exposure of the influenza virus by 96% in the period immediately after a cough. Face shields have a large number of benefits compared with other forms of face/eye protection but should be paired with other forms of facial PPE in infection control due to poor peripheral protection. Safety Overloading the bed capacity (200 kg) may cause collapse. Complementary Technical Systems Bulk sanitiser can be ordered for the Foldable Sanitise Dispenser (Footpress). Academic Research and References Lindsley W. G. et al., 2014, Efficacy of Face Shields Against Cough Aerosol Droplets from a Cough Simulator , Journal of Occupational and Environmental Hygiene 11(8): 509-518 Roberge, R.J., 2016, Face shields for infection control: A review , Journal of Occupational and Environmental Hygiene 13(4): 235-242. Compliance with regulations The foldable foot sanitiser dispenser quality is certified according to CE marketing Council Directive on Medical Devices 93/42/EECas Amended 2007/47/EC Class I, and the RoHS Directive (2011/65/EU) as Amended (EU) 2015/863 of the European Parliament and of the Council on the restriction of use of certain Hazardous Substances. Evaluation methods Unknown Other Information The Amitoje Bed can be found here . The Foldable Sanitiser Dispenser (Footpress) can be found here . CE marketing Council Directive on Medical Devices 93/42/EECas Amended 2007/47/EC Class I , and the RoHS Directive (2011/65/EU) as Amended (EU) 2015/863 of the European Parliament.
